case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. BROWN, ERICK

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ERICK
JUDICIAL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ERICK $7,492.78 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.78

WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY TO SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ERICK BROWN

WRIT OF EXECUTION, MONEY JUDGMENT, ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON SEP-12-02, RETURNED PARTIALLY SATISFIED, IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,799.18.
